verse_text: For we do not preach ourselves, but Christ Jesus the Lord, and ourselves your bondservants for Jesus' sake.

links.context: (See [[MRK.10:42]]-45; [[2CO.4:5]].) Those entrusted to you (Gr. kleron) means those who have "the inheritance"; the word is the source of the English "clergy." In the OT the Levites were the kleros; their inheritance was the Lord. In the NT all are kleros, a royal priesthood, equally inheriting the Lord. While there are "orders" of clergy in the Church-- bishops, presbyters, deacons--a separation or isolation between priests and laity is unknown in the NT.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
